item.title: My Family Story
item.description: Brooke Makenna reflects on what happened to 19 of her siblings in this personal family story.

item.title: Serial Killer Dad Swears He’s Innocent
item.description: Brooke Makenna discusses a true crime case and the questions surrounding a father's denial.

item.title: Things Were Worse Than Anticipated
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a true-crime story with a tragic outcome, presented in a concise and respectful format.

item.title: Baby Left Alone on a Farm After Tragedy
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a story about a baby left alone on a farm after the parents died.

item.title: Was This a Sacrifice for Success?

item.title: Emmarae case update from Brooke Makenna
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares an update on the Emmarae case and the identification of a suspect charged in connection with her disappearance.

item.title: Brooke Makenna on a Family Allegation
item.description: Brooke Makenna discusses a claim involving a family member and hidden wrongdoing.
